title: ASelected 24 Pieces Emulsion Paint Roller Set, Small Paint Roller 4 Inch Includes a Paint Tray, Mini Rollers, Sleeves for DIY Painting with Emulsion Paints on Walls, Ceilings
features: Quantity and size: There are a total of 20 paint rollers of two different kinds, 10 of imitation wool and 10 of polyester material each with a length of 10cm and a diameter of 3cm, 2 of supports with a length of 30cm, and 2 of blue trays with a size of 29x15x4.5cm, which can be used by many people together

Flexible design: the roller can be directly inserted into the roller rod, will not easily fall off, easy to replace, mini roller brush can be brushed to some small places, is a good choice for home decoration

diy: Paint roller set is suitable for most of the surface objects, such as walls, ceilings, solid wood items brush varnish, etc., you can also diy pattern on the wall, the set has 20 rollers to meet the dipping of various colors, to prevent cross-color

Durable material: The thickness of the roller is 1cm. Plush is firm, not easy to fall off, roller shaft is clinker hot melt process, bracket part is stainless steel, can be dipped in a lot of paint, and oil corrosion resistance, durable

Use: The assembly of the paint roller requires some effort until the roller is fully inserted, and there is no need to worry about rolling. The size of the roller shaft is 0.7cm, which is suitable for most supports. The paint roller brush has strong applicability, comfortable hand feel and non-slip, flexible rotation, the mini roller sleeve will not fall off, and the wall painting is effortless
description: From the manufacturer The mini roller covers faster than a large brush and also allows for wall painting, diy, and creating a wall of your own memories! Use anywhere but ceilings, etc. Mini rollers are perfect for tight spots like windows and corners. Mini paint tray helps you pour the right amount of paint to avoid waste The handle is made of plastic, the other parts are stainless steel, long life, easy to clean
